.alter database policy ingestionbatching @'{"MaximumBatchingTimeSpan":"00:00:20","MaximumNumberOfItems":500,"MaximumRawDataSizeMB":300,"Origin":0}'
.add database  viewers (@'tridentgroup=TridentViewers_b8546354-5b6c-43b6-b8cc-d59c409dde49_b96b158b-bac8-478d-b542-be6233e0ab1b;*') "Added as \'tridentgroup=TridentViewers_b8546354-5b6c-43b6-b8cc-d59c409dde49_b96b158b-bac8-478d-b542-be6233e0ab1b;*\'"
.add database  admins (@'tridentgroup=TridentAdmins_b8546354-5b6c-43b6-b8cc-d59c409dde49_b96b158b-bac8-478d-b542-be6233e0ab1b;*') "Added as \'tridentgroup=TridentAdmins_b8546354-5b6c-43b6-b8cc-d59c409dde49_b96b158b-bac8-478d-b542-be6233e0ab1b;*\'"

.create-merge table raw_events (eventId:guid, eventType:string, type:string, eventName:string, userId:guid, timestamp:datetime, properties:dynamic, context:dynamic, ingestedAtUtc:datetime) 
.create-or-alter table raw_events ingestion json mapping 'raw_events_mapping'
```
[{"Properties":{"Path":"$['eventId']"},"column":"eventId","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['eventType']"},"column":"eventType","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['type']"},"column":"type","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['eventName']"},"column":"eventName","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['userId']"},"column":"userId","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['timestamp']"},"column":"timestamp","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['properties']"},"column":"properties","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['context']"},"column":"context","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['ingestedAtUtc']"},"column":"ingestedAtUtc","datatype":""}]
```
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") allSessions(eventDate:datetime) {
    let startGame = 
    raw_events
    | extend localtime=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp,'US/Pacific')
    | where localtime between (startofday(eventDate) .. endofday(eventDate))
    | where ["type"] == "game"
    | where eventName in  ("game.start")
    | project eventType, type, start=eventName, userId, startTime=localtime, sessionId = toguid(properties.sessionId), questionCount = toint(properties.questionCount), timestamp;
    let score=
    raw_events
    | extend localtime=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp,'US/Pacific')
    | where localtime between (startofday(eventDate) .. endofday(eventDate))
    | where eventName == "game.answerquestion"
    | where isnotempty(FinalScore= tostring(properties.totalScore) )
    | summarize arg_max (localtime, * ) by sessionId = toguid(properties.sessionId)
    | project sessionId, FinalScore= toint(properties.totalScore);
    let name=
    raw_events
    | extend localtime=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp,'US/Pacific')
    | where localtime between (startofday(eventDate) .. endofday(eventDate))
    | where eventName == "user.register"
    | distinct userId, userName = tostring(properties.name);
    let endGame =
    raw_events
    | extend localtime=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp,'US/Pacific')
    | where localtime between (startofday(eventDate) .. endofday(eventDate))
    | where ["type"] == "game"
    | where eventName in  ("game.ended")
    | project eventType, type, end=eventName, endTime=localtime, sessionId = toguid(properties.sessionId), questionsAnswered = toint(properties.questionsAnswered), correctAnswers=toint(properties.correctAnswers),streaksCompleted=toint(properties.streaksCompleted),timeRemaining=toint(properties.timeRemaining),stationId=tostring(context.stationId);
    startGame
    | lookup endGame on sessionId
    | lookup score on sessionId
    | lookup name on userId
    | extend gameTime = case(isempty(endTime), (now()-startTime), endTime-startTime)
}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") currentSession(eventDate:datetime) {
    allSessions(eventDate)
    | where isempty(end) //and gameTime < timespan(4 m)
}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") questionsBySession(eventDate:datetime) {let sessionlist=
    currentSession(eventDate)
    | summarize make_list(sessionId);
    raw_events
    | where ["type"] == "game" 
    | where eventName == "game.answerquestion"
    | where properties.sessionId in (sessionlist)
    | summarize arg_max(timestamp, *) by tostring(properties.sessionId)
    | extend questionId = tostring(properties.questionId), isCorrect = tobool(properties.isCorrect)
    | lookup external_table('Questions') on $left.questionId == $right.id
    | project questionText}
.create-or-alter function with (folder = "Calendar", skipvalidation = "true") Calendar(DaysBack:timespan=time(365.00:00:00), Precision:timespan=time(1.00:00:00)) {
    let _startDate = startofday(ago(DaysBack));
     let _endDate = startofday(now());
     range Date from _startDate to _endDate step Precision
    | extend
        ["Year"]=getyear(["Date"]),
        ["Month"]=getmonth(["Date"]),
        ["Week of Year"]=week_of_year(["Date"]),
        ["Week of Month"]=(dayofmonth(["Date"]) / 7) + 1,
        ["Day"]=datepart('day', ["Date"])
}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") leaderboard(EventDate:datetime, top:int=10) {
    let NumStreaks = raw_events
        | extend localtime=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp,'US/Pacific')
        | where localtime between (startofday(EventDate) .. endofday(EventDate))
        | extend sessionId = toguid(properties.sessionId)
        | summarize streakCount=countif(eventName == "game.streakcompleted"), timestamp=min(timestamp), localtime=min(localtime) by userId,sessionId;
     allSessions(EventDate)
    | lookup NumStreaks on userId, sessionId
    | project userName, FinalScore, correctAnswers, streakCount, stationId,timestamp,localtime,userId
    | lookup stationImages on stationId
    | summarize arg_max(FinalScore,*) by userName
        | where userName !in ("Jeff Struthers","Tyler","Matt Hicks","Hanselman")
    | top ['top'] by FinalScore desc 
    | serialize
    | sort by FinalScore desc, localtime asc
    | extend Rank= row_number()
    | extend userName = iff(strlen(userName)<=20,userName,strcat(substring(userName,0,20),"..."))
}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") stationImages() {
datatable(stationId:string,imageUrl:string,wizzardName:string)[
   "quantumqueryist","https://i.postimg.cc/X79tB84Y/QQ-v4-2.png","Quantum Queryist",
   "insightsalchemist","https://i.postimg.cc/G2pXMFWJ/IA-v2-1.png","Insights Alchemist",
   "dashboarddruid","https://i.postimg.cc/Cx56Q080/DD-v2-(1).png","Dashboard Druid"
]
}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") topEasiestCategory(EventDate:datetime, top:int) {
answersCategory
| sort by percentageCorrect desc 
| extend EasyQuestion=percentageCorrect
| take top
}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") topHardestCategory(EventDate:datetime, top:int) {
answersCategory
| sort by percentageIncorrect desc 
| extend EasyQuestion=percentageIncorrect
| take top
}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") stationStatistics(EventDate:datetime) {
    raw_events
| where eventName == "game.answerquestion"
| extend stationId = tostring(context.stationId), isCorrect=tobool(properties.isCorrect), category=tostring(context.category)
| summarize CorrectQuestions=countif(isCorrect), IncorrectQuestions=countif(not(isCorrect)) by stationId, category
| lookup stationImages on stationId
}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") answersCategory() {
        raw_events
| where eventName == "game.answerquestion"
| extend isCorrect=tobool(properties.isCorrect)
//| where tobool(properties.isCorrect) == false
| summarize CorrectAnswers=countif(isCorrect),IncorrectAnswers=countif(not(isCorrect)), TotalAnswers=count() by tostring(properties.category)
| extend percentageCorrect = toreal(CorrectAnswers)/toreal(TotalAnswers), percentageIncorrect=toreal(IncorrectAnswers)/toreal(TotalAnswers)
}
.create-or-alter external table Questions (_rid:string, id:string, category:string, questionText:string, answers:string, correctAnswerKey:long, metadata:string, createdAt:string, _ts:long)
                kind = delta
                (
                    h@"https://onelakenorthcentralus.pbidedicated.windows.net/81d413f1-ac32-4c3f-a583-5a0485b0a7c3/b96b158b-bac8-478d-b542-be6233e0ab1b/Tables/Questions;impersonate"
                )
.alter external table ['Questions'] policy query_acceleration @'{"IsEnabled":true,"Hot":"36500.00:00:00","MaxAge":"00:05:00","HotWindows":[],"ManagedIdentity":null,"HotDateTimeColumn":null}'
.create-or-alter external table Users (_rid:string, id:string, name:string, email:string, phoneNumber:string, createdAt:string, updatedAt:string, _ts:long)
                kind = delta
                (
                    h@"https://onelakenorthcentralus.pbidedicated.windows.net/81d413f1-ac32-4c3f-a583-5a0485b0a7c3/b96b158b-bac8-478d-b542-be6233e0ab1b/Tables/Users;impersonate"
                )
.alter external table ['Users'] policy query_acceleration @'{"IsEnabled":true,"Hot":"36500.00:00:00","MaxAge":"00:05:00","HotWindows":[],"ManagedIdentity":null,"HotDateTimeColumn":null}'
.add table raw_events admins (@'aaduser=f1db4f7d-9d21-4770-913e-8a83db64dcf7;b8546354-5b6c-43b6-b8cc-d59c409dde49')


.create-or-alter function with (folder = "Calendar", skipvalidation = "true") Calendar(DaysBack:timespan=time(30.00:00:00), Precision:timespan=time(1.00:00:00)) {
    let _startDate = startofday(ago(DaysBack));
     let _endDate = startofday(now());
     range Date from _startDate to _endDate step Precision
    | extend
        ["Year"]=getyear(["Date"]),
        ["Month"]=getmonth(["Date"]),
        ["Week of Year"]=week_of_year(["Date"]),
        ["Week of Month"]=(dayofmonth(["Date"]) / 7) + 1,
        ["Day"]=datepart('day', ["Date"])
}

currentSession(now())

let _eventDate = todatetime(2025-03-05);
// baseQuery _todaysevents
let _todaysevents = () {
    raw_events
    | extend timestamp=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp,'Israel')
    | where timestamp between (startofday(_eventDate)..endofday(_eventDate))
};
let pool=
raw_events
| where eventName == "game.start"
| extend pool=tostring(context.poolName)
| extend session=tostring(context.sessionId)
| project pool, userId, session;
_todaysevents
| where eventName == "game.answerquestion"
| extend
    questionId = tostring(properties.questionId),
    station= tostring(context.stationId),
    isCorrect = case(tobool(properties.isCorrect) == "true", "correct", "incorrect") 
    | summarize arg_max(timestamp, *) by station
    | sort by timestamp
    | lookup external_table('Questions') on $left.questionId == $right.id
    | extend session = tostring(properties.sessionId)
    | lookup pool on session
    | project questionText, isCorrect, station, pool
    | extend loc = case (station == "quantumqueryist", "1", station == "dashboarddruid", "2", station == "insightsalchemist", "3", "")
    | sort by loc asc


external_table('Questions')
| take 10

| extend timestamp2=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp,'Israel')
| where timestamp2 between (startofday(datetime(2026-03-05)) .. endofday(datetime(2026-03-05)))

| where timestamp between (startofday(now())..endofday(now()))

allSessions(now())

allSessions(now())
| where pool == "Fabric"
| extend JoinKey = iff(isnotempty(state), state, country)
| join kind=leftouter (
    locations
    | extend JoinKey = iff(CountryRegion_ShortName == "United States", AdminDivision1, CountryRegion_ShortName)
    | project JoinKey,
              CountryRegion_ShortName,
              AdminDivision1,
              Longitude,
              Latitude
) on JoinKey
| project state, country, pool ,Longitude, Latitude, correctAnswers
| summarize totalCorrectAnswers=sum(correctAnswers) by tostring(pool), country, state, Longitude, Latitude
| extend radius_meters = case(
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 5,  70000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 10,  110000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 15,  140000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 20, 170000,
                              210000
    )
| extend circle_geometry =
    geo_point_buffer(
        Longitude,
        Latitude,
        radius_meters
    )

let _eventDate = now();
let pool =
raw_events
| where eventName == "game.start"
| extend pool=tostring(context.poolName)
| extend session=tostring(context.sessionId)
| project pool, userId, session;
raw_events
| extend timestamp=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp,'US/Eastern')
| where timestamp between (startofday(_eventDate)..endofday(_eventDate))
| where eventName == "game.answerquestion"
| extend
    questionId = tostring(properties.questionId),
    station= tostring(context.stationId),
    isCorrect = case(tobool(properties.isCorrect) == "true", "correct", "incorrect") 
    | summarize arg_max(timestamp, *) by station
    | sort by timestamp
    | lookup external_table('Questions') on $left.questionId == $right.id
    | extend session = tostring(properties.sessionId)
    | lookup pool on session
    | project questionText, isCorrect, station, pool
    | extend loc = case (station == "quantumqueryist", "1", station == "dashboarddruid", "2", station == "insightsalchemist", "3", "")
    | sort by loc asc

// KQL script
// Use management commands in this script to configure your database items, such as tables, functions, materialized views, and more.
.create-merge table raw_events (eventId:guid, eventType:string, type:string, eventName:string, userId:guid, timestamp:datetime, properties:dynamic, context:dynamic, ingestedAtUtc:datetime) 
.create-or-alter table raw_events ingestion json mapping 'raw_events_mapping'

```
[{"Properties":{"Path":"$['eventId']"},"column":"eventId","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['eventType']"},"column":"eventType","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['type']"},"column":"type","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['eventName']"},"column":"eventName","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['userId']"},"column":"userId","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['timestamp']"},"column":"timestamp","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['properties']"},"column":"properties","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['context']"},"column":"context","datatype":""},{"Properties":{"Path":"$['ingestedAtUtc']"},"column":"ingestedAtUtc","datatype":""}]
```

.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") allSessions(eventDate:datetime) {
let startGame = 
    raw_events
    | extend localtime=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp, 'US/Pacific')
    | where localtime between (startofday(eventDate) .. endofday(eventDate))
    | where ["type"] == "game"
    | where eventName in  ("game.start")
    | project
        eventType,
        type,
        start=eventName,
        userId,
        startTime=localtime,
        sessionId = toguid(properties.sessionId),
        questionCount = toint(properties.questionCount),
        pool=tostring(context.poolName),
        timestamp;
let score=
    raw_events
    | extend localtime=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp, 'US/Pacific')
    | where localtime between (startofday(eventDate) .. endofday(eventDate))
    | where eventName == "game.answerquestion"
    | where isnotempty(FinalScore= tostring(properties.totalScore))
    | summarize arg_max (localtime, *) by sessionId = toguid(properties.sessionId)
    | project sessionId, FinalScore= toint(properties.totalScore);
let name=
    raw_events
    | extend localtime=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp, 'US/Pacific')
    | where localtime between (startofday(eventDate) .. endofday(eventDate))
    | where eventName == "user.register"
    | distinct
        userId,
        userName = tostring(properties.name),
        country=tostring(properties.country),
        state=tostring(properties.state);
let endGame =
    raw_events
    | extend localtime=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp, 'US/Pacific')
    | where localtime between (startofday(eventDate) .. endofday(eventDate))
    | where ["type"] == "game"
    | where eventName in  ("game.ended")
    | project
        eventType,
        type,
        end=eventName,
        endTime=localtime,
        sessionId = toguid(properties.sessionId),
        questionsAnswered = toint(properties.questionsAnswered),
        correctAnswers=toint(properties.correctAnswers),
        streaksCompleted=toint(properties.streaksCompleted),
        timeRemaining=toint(properties.timeRemaining),
        stationId=tostring(context.stationId);
startGame
| join kind=leftouter name on userId
| lookup endGame on sessionId
| lookup score on sessionId
| extend gameTime = case(isempty(endTime), (now() - startTime), endTime - startTime)}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") currentSession(eventDate:datetime) {
    allSessions(eventDate)
    | where isempty(end) //and gameTime < timespan(4 m)
}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") questionsBySession(eventDate:datetime) {let sessionlist=
    currentSession(eventDate)
    | summarize make_list(sessionId);
    raw_events
    | where ["type"] == "game" 
    | where eventName == "game.answerquestion"
    | where properties.sessionId in (sessionlist)
    | summarize arg_max(timestamp, *) by tostring(properties.sessionId)
    | extend questionId = tostring(properties.questionId), isCorrect = tobool(properties.isCorrect)
    | lookup external_table('Questions') on $left.questionId == $right.id
    | project questionText}
.create-or-alter function with (folder = "Calendar", skipvalidation = "true") Calendar(DaysBack:timespan=time(30.00:00:00), Precision:timespan=time(1.00:00:00)) {
    let _startDate = startofday(ago(DaysBack));
     let _endDate = startofday(now());
     range Date from _startDate to _endDate step Precision
    | extend
        ["Year"]=getyear(["Date"]),
        ["Month"]=getmonth(["Date"]),
        ["Week of Year"]=week_of_year(["Date"]),
        ["Week of Month"]=(dayofmonth(["Date"]) / 7) + 1,
        ["Day"]=datepart('day', ["Date"])
}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") leaderboard(EventDate:datetime, top:int=10) {
    let NumStreaks = raw_events
        | extend localtime=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp,'US/Pacific')
        | where localtime between (startofday(EventDate) .. endofday(EventDate))
        | extend sessionId = toguid(properties.sessionId)
        | summarize streakCount=countif(eventName == "game.streakcompleted"), timestamp=min(timestamp), localtime=min(localtime) by userId,sessionId;
     allSessions(EventDate)
    | lookup NumStreaks on userId, sessionId
    | project userName, FinalScore, correctAnswers, streakCount, stationId,timestamp,localtime,userId
    | lookup stationImages on stationId
    | summarize arg_max(FinalScore,*) by userName
        | where userName !in ("Jeff Struthers","Tyler","Matt Hicks","Hanselman")
    | top ['top'] by FinalScore desc 
    | serialize
    | sort by FinalScore desc, localtime asc
    | extend Rank= row_number()
    | extend userName = iff(strlen(userName)<=20,userName,strcat(substring(userName,0,20),"..."))
}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") stationImages() {
datatable(stationId:string,imageUrl:string,wizzardName:string)[
   "quantumqueryist","https://i.postimg.cc/X79tB84Y/QQ-v4-2.png","Quantum Queryist",
   "insightsalchemist","https://i.postimg.cc/G2pXMFWJ/IA-v2-1.png","Insights Alchemist",
   "dashboarddruid","https://i.postimg.cc/Cx56Q080/DD-v2-(1).png","Dashboard Druid"
]
}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") topEasiestCategory(EventDate:datetime, top:int) {
answersCategory
| sort by percentageCorrect desc 
| extend EasyQuestion=percentageCorrect
| take top
}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") topHardestCategory(EventDate:datetime, top:int) {
answersCategory
| sort by percentageIncorrect desc 
| extend EasyQuestion=percentageIncorrect
| take top
}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") stationStatistics(EventDate:datetime) {
    raw_events
| where eventName == "game.answerquestion"
| extend stationId = tostring(context.stationId), isCorrect=tobool(properties.isCorrect), category=tostring(context.category)
| summarize CorrectQuestions=countif(isCorrect), IncorrectQuestions=countif(not(isCorrect)) by stationId, category
| lookup stationImages on stationId
}
.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") answersCategory() {
        raw_events
| where eventName == "game.answerquestion"
| extend isCorrect=tobool(properties.isCorrect)
//| where tobool(properties.isCorrect) == false
| summarize CorrectAnswers=countif(isCorrect),IncorrectAnswers=countif(not(isCorrect)), TotalAnswers=count() by tostring(properties.category)
| extend percentageCorrect = toreal(CorrectAnswers)/toreal(TotalAnswers), percentageIncorrect=toreal(IncorrectAnswers)/toreal(TotalAnswers)
}
